prompt: Create a highly detailed, ultra-cute street fashion portrait featuring a stylish young man, his adorable chibi mini version, and two fluffy Maine Coon cats. All characters wear matching oversized red sports jerseys with the number 27, distressed light-blue jeans, white sneakers, and red baseball caps worn backwards. The chibi character has large expressive eyes, cartoon proportions, and a charming smile. The cats are sitting calmly on both sides wearing matching red jerseys. Background is a modern urban street with industrial architecture, soft cinematic lighting, shallow depth of field, luxury fashion photography style, vibrant colors, realistic textures, professional composition, 8K resolution, Pixar-meets-realism aesthetic, Instagram viral quality, cute and wholesome atmosphere.
